sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n92462" key="r(i/n" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ῥίν</orth>, <sense id="n92462.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ῥίς</ref></xr>. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ῥῖνα</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, Hellenistic for <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ῥίνη</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0011.tlg007.perseus-grc1:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1</biblScope></bibl></cit>, Moer.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0011.tlg007.perseus-grc1:p.338P" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.338P.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
